mapper.select:
/* selectBillByTransportData */
, group1_summary AS ( SELECT tbm.boss_id, COUNT(DISTINCT tbm.transport_id) AS tot_count, /* 수량운임(QTY)과 중량운임(WEIGHT)을 구분하여 합산 */ SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'QTY' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS untpc_raw, SUM(CASE WHEN tbm.calculation_cd = 'WEIGHT' THEN tbm.amount ELSE 0 END) AS weight_raw, COALESCE(MAX(s.communication_fee), 0) AS comm_fee FROM transport_by_month tbm LEFT JOIN shipper s ON s.company_id = tbm.boss_id AND s.shipper_cd = 'COM' AND s.del_yn = 'N' AND s.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY tbm.boss_id ), group2_summary AS ( SELECT fpm.ultimate_id AS boss_id, MAX(sh.communication_fee) AS comm_fee FROM shipper sh INNER JOIN final_parent_map fpm ON fpm.company_id = sh.company_id INNER JOIN shipper boss_sh ON boss_sh.company_id = fpm.ultimate_id AND boss_sh.bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId} AND boss_sh.bill_stdr_cd = #{billCd} AND boss_sh.use_yn = 'Y' AND boss_sh.del_yn = 'N' AND boss_sh.shipper_cd = 'COM' LEFT JOIN group1_summary g1 ON g1.boss_id = fpm.ultimate_id WHERE sh.del_yn = 'N' AND sh.shipper_cd = 'COM' AND sh.use_yn = 'Y' AND sh.bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId} AND sh.bill_stdr_cd = #{billCd} AND g1.boss_id IS NULL AND sh.communication_fee > 0 GROUP BY fpm.ultimate_id ), final_agg_source AS ( SELECT comm_fee, untpc_raw, weight_raw, tot_count FROM group1_summary UNION ALL SELECT comm_fee, 0 AS untpc_raw, 0 AS weight_raw, 0 AS tot_count FROM group2_summary ) /* 모든 필드를 명시적으로 조회해야 INSERT 시 객체에 값이 담깁니다. */ SELECT #{billCompanyId} AS bill_company_id, #{billCd} AS bill_cd, #{year} AS year, #{month} AS month, /* 통신비 및 부가세 */ SUM(comm_fee) AS communication_fee, ROUND(SUM(comm_fee) * 0.1) AS communication_fee_vat, /* 수량운임 및 부가세 (untpc 필드) */ SUM(untpc_raw) AS untpc, ROUND(SUM(untpc_raw) * 0.1) AS untpc_vat, /* 중량운임 및 부가세 (weight_untpc 필드) */ SUM(weight_raw) AS weight_untpc, ROUND(SUM(weight_raw) * 0.1) AS weight_untpc_vat, /* 총 건수 및 총 금액 */ SUM(tot_count) AS tot_count, ROUND(SUM(comm_fee + untpc_raw + weight_raw) * 1.1) AS tot_amount FROM final_agg_source
mapper.insert: /* insertBill */ INSERT INTO bill ( bill_company_id, year, month, bill_cd, tot_amount, communication_fee, communication_fee_vat, untpc, untpc_vat, weight_untpc, weight_untpc_vat, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{param.billCompanyId}, #{param.year}, #{param.month}, #{param.billCd}, #{param.totAmount}::INTEGER, #{param.communicationFee}::INTEGER, #{param.communicationFeeVat}::INTEGER, #{param.untpc}::INTEGER, #{param.untpcVat}::INTEGER, #{param.weightUntpc}::INTEGER, #{param.weightUntpcVat}::INTEGER, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, 'N' )
mapper.update: /* updateBillReCalculation */ UPDATE bill bi SET tot_amount = bid.tot_amount , communication_fee = bid.communication_fee , communication_fee_vat = bid.communication_fee_vat , untpc = bid.untpc , untpc_vat = bid.untpc_vat , weight_untpc = bid.weight_untpc , weight_untpc_vat = bid.weight_untpc_vat , chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId} , chg_dt = now() FROM ( /* 각 업체별로 가장 최근에 생성된(MAX dgre) 차수 정보만 미리 추출 */ WITH latest_dgre AS ( SELECT bill_id, calculation_company_id, MAX(bill_dtl_dgre) AS max_dgre FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_id = #{param.billId} AND del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY bill_id, calculation_company_id ) /* 최신 차수 데이터만 합산 */ SELECT bd.bill_id , SUM(bd.tot_amount) AS tot_amount , SUM(bd.communication_fee) AS communication_fee , SUM(bd.communication_fee_vat) AS communication_fee_vat , SUM(bd.untpc) AS untpc , SUM(bd.untpc_vat) AS untpc_vat , SUM(bd.weight_untpc) AS weight_untpc , SUM(bd.weight_untpc_vat) AS weight_untpc_vat FROM bill_dtl bd INNER JOIN latest_dgre ld ON bd.bill_id = ld.bill_id AND bd.calculation_company_id = ld.calculation_company_id AND bd.bill_dtl_dgre = ld.max_dgre WHERE bd.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY bd.bill_id ) bid WHERE bi.bill_id = bid.bill_id

UPDATE bill_history SET bill_status_cd = #{billStatusCd}, tot_amount = #{totAmount}, bass_amount = #{bassAmount}, bass_amount_vat = #{bassAmountVat}, delivery_amount = #{deliveryAmount}, delivery_amount_vat = #{deliveryAmountVat}, edi_amount = #{ediAmount}, edi_amount_vat = #{ediAmountVat}, chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = #{chgDt} WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
